# User experience brief

## User goal

_What the user is ultimately trying to accomplish._

## Intended experience

_A short description of the experience you are aiming for._

## Happy path

_The intended, successful flow, step by step._

## Edge cases

_Unusual but valid states, inputs, and combinations._

## Failure modes

_What can go wrong and what the user should see when it does._

## User-facing terminology

_Names, labels, and words the user will encounter._

## Assumptions and prerequisites

_What must be true before the user starts._

## What users should not need to understand

_Internal detail that should stay hidden from the user._

## Documentation implications

_What user docs may need to explain, warn about, or teach._

## Open questions

_Unresolved points and things needing confirmation._
